title: To-Do List Writer
scenario: Write a to-do list for the week. The to-do list should include 5 tasks. The tasks should be formatted as a numbered list.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the to-do list meets the constraints of being under 100 words and including a heading.
Check if the to-do list includes exactly 5 tasks.
Check if the to-do list is formatted as a numbered list.
